title: Raccoon Removal in Sleepy Hollow, NY | $900-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Sleepy Hollow, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Serving historic homes & properties. Call for fast service!
intro: Sleepy Hollow's historic homes and wooded landscapes create ideal conditions for raccoon infestations. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional raccoon removal services throughout Sleepy Hollow, protecting your property from these destructive wildlife intruders. Our humane removal methods safely eliminate raccoons from attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces while preventing future entry.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Sleepy Hollow residents, with certified technicians who understand the unique challenges of protecting Westchester's historic properties. We offer same-day emergency service, humane removal techniques, and comprehensive exclusion work with warranty protection for complete peace of mind.
localContext: Sleepy Hollow's proximity to the Hudson River and Rockefeller State Park Preserve attracts abundant raccoon populations that frequently target historic homes along Broadway and properties near the Old Dutch Church. The village's century-old architecture, with its accessible attics and chimneys, requires specialized wildlife exclusion techniques that preserve historical integrity while effectively preventing raccoon entry.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Sleepy Hollow?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Sleepy Hollow typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Sleepy Hollow?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Sleepy Hollow due to the abundance of wooded areas, proximity to waterways like the Hudson River and Pocantico River, and the village's mature trees and historic homes that provide ideal denning sites. Raccoon activity increases significantly during spring birthing season and fall when they seek winter shelter.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Sleepy Hollow home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Sleepy Hollow and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. We follow all New York State humane wildlife regulations throughout the removal process.

faqs.question: Will raccoons damage my historic Sleepy Hollow home?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can cause significant damage to historic properties by tearing shingles, damaging soffits and fascia, destroying insulation, chewing electrical wiring, and leaving contaminated waste in attics. Our exclusion services are specifically designed to protect Sleepy Hollow's older homes while maintaining their architectural character and preventing raccoons from returning.
